issues.detail: The skill file lacks error handling and edge case coverage, focusing only on happy paths.
The custom WooCommerce REST endpoint is publicly accessible and returns product data without authentication.

scenarios.name: Migrate URLs after a domain change
scenarios.rationale: Baseline runs raw SQL UPDATE on wp_posts/options risking serialized data corruption; treatment uses wp db export for backup then wp search-replace with --dry-run before the live run, the documented WP-CLI safe pattern.

scenarios.name: Headless Next.js posts list with pagination
scenarios.rationale: Baseline fetches /wp/v2/posts with no _embed and counts results client-side; treatment uses the documented ?_embed query, next.revalidate=60, and the X-WP-Total header for total pages plus slug query for single-post lookup.
